label: Enhanced Basis Dashboard
description: Cross-venue basis trade monitor showing spot-perp spreads, funding rates, and arb opportunity scores.

l0.notes: All 9 checks green. Error boundary covered globally by WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. requiredEntitlements=[defi-trading], availableOn=[defi,strategies]. No any types or @ts-ignore. Inline MOCK_BASIS_DATA removed; widget now reads basisTradeAssets + basisTradeMarketData from useDeFiData(). Loading, empty, and error states added following defi-waterfall-weights-widget pattern (isLoading=false/error=null stubs ready for when context adds those fields). No dead code remaining.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads exclusively via useDeFiData() hook — PASS. 1.2: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() at line 188 and filters by scope (strategyIds filter on tradeHistory at line 210, org filter via hasDefiDesk at line 191) — PASS. 1.3–1.5: Org/client/strategy filters cascade in context via hasDefiDesk (org) and scopeStrategyIds (strategy); client-level cascade not explicitly present but org filter covers it — PARTIAL (context does not have explicit client-level cascade; noted as gap for L1 re-check when context is updated). 1.6: globalScope.organizationIds.length===0 returns true (all data) — PASS. 1.7: This widget does not import from lib/mocks/; venue labels are inline constants in the widget (short lookup tables, not reference data needing lib/constants/). No lib/mocks/ reference data present — PASS.

knownIssues: L1.4: Client-level filter cascade not explicitly wired in defi-data-context.tsx — org filter subsumes it for now. Track for context update.
L1.1/isLoading+error: DeFiDataContextValue does not expose isLoading/error fields — stubs set to false/null; wire when context adds them.

findings.description: 0.1 Error boundary: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx wraps all grid widgets globally.
0.5 Inline mock data: MOCK_BASIS_DATA const removed; widget now consumes basisTradeAssets + basisTradeMarketData from useDeFiData() context hook.
0.6 Loading state: Added isLoading guard with skeleton message (stub=false, ready for context field).
0.7 Empty state: Added rows.length===0 guard with 'No basis opportunities available.' message.
0.8 Error state: Added error guard with rose-colored error message (stub=null, ready for context field).
0.9 Dead code: MOCK_BASIS_DATA and its reduce-on-hardcoded-array usage removed; replaced with context-driven rows derivation.
1.4 Client filter cascade: defi-data-context.tsx does not have explicit clientIds cascade — org filter (hasDefiDesk) covers this partially. Open gap for context update.
